description: Their customer support has been fantastic. So far a great onboarding experience
author: Ted J.
pros: the ease of use and the great tutorial they have to explain the why and how to for their tools!
cons: I have not used it enough to experience anything negative yet!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best alternative to Ahref and Semrush
author: Ivan G.
pros: I've worked with numerous keyword research and SEO tools, but until I came across Wincher, SEMrush and Ahrefs were my go-to platforms. Wincher, however, offers a strong alternative that competes head-to-head with these industry leaders. The user interface is incredibly intuitive, making it easy to access its robust suite of SEO tracking tools. What sets Wincher apart is its excellent customer support—fast, responsive, and always ready to assist with any questions or issues. For anyone looking for an affordable yet powerful SEO tool, Wincher is a fantastic choice. Highly recommend!
cons: Nothing, really. The only thing I can think of is that their keyword gap analysis tool can be a bit too broad. However, it still provides filtering options which are helpful for competitor analysis.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Christoph T.
pros: It does track the specific keyword. The problem is that that’s not how Google works. And you miss out on tracking all the other related ones.
cons: in theory, it’s a good tool, but it only tracks the exact keyword that you put in there and their billing practices are not very customer friendly. No reminder nothing. Here’s the charge. Not very easy to work with. Would not recommend. In the sea of available tools, it’s definitely not a way to stand out.

review_title: Simple to use, easy to get data
description: ’ve used Wincher across multiple sites including group companies and clients, and it’s been a straightforward, reliable way to track keyword rankings without the noise of a full SEO suite. Daily updates, simple competitor tracking, and a clean interface make it easy to see what’s working and react quickly. It does exactly what I need.
author: Rad D.
pros: Easy to add keywords and track performance — saves time and keeps everything simple without unnecessary complexity.
cons: Does most of what I need for internal group companies and my agency clients. Some limitations like users only available on higher plans. Most annoying thing is the way it double counts keywords if you want to track mobile and desktop.

description: I had a fantastic experience with Wincher! The customer service team was incredibly understanding and accommodating, ensuring my needs were met. They truly go above and beyond to ensure a smooth and personalized experience. Highly recommend!
author: Steve S.
pros: Wincher helps solve the problem of maintaining competitive SEO for our client accounts. By providing real-time insights and tracking keyword performance, it ensures that our clients stay ahead in their respective markets. This allows us to continually optimize their SEO strategies, ultimately driving better visibility and results in search engine rankings.
cons: Some features were not easy to understand until we contacted customer support.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A great SEO tool for business owners
description: I own an online store (not an SEO specialist) and would definitely recommend Wincher to all other business owners.
author: Igor K.
pros: I am impressed with the quality, depth and accuracy of the information presented by Wincher. This service is integrated with Yoast, has a user-friendly dashboard, and offers access to various features that have helped me improve my SEO results. I especially like the keyword tracking and ranking tools. It's fantastically helpful to see improvements in real time. Also, the support team at Wincher is amazingly responsive and pleasant to work with, and shows a great interest in developing their service.
cons: The service is actively developing and not all of its features are working satisfactorily yet. For example, I paid attention to the On-Page SEO Checker tool not working quite correctly.

author: Peter G.
pros: Wincher has a user-friendly interface, is easy to navigate, and their customer support is friendly and helpful. Definitely recommend them!
cons: It was a slightly inaccurate than they competitors. However I liked Wincher, would recommend them. :)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Andre A.
pros: I’ve been using Wincher for a while now, and I’m genuinely impressed with the platform’s capabilities. The tool provides insightful and accurate keyword tracking, allowing us to monitor and refine our SEO strategies effectively. It’s user-friendly, with a clean interface that makes navigating between projects and reports smooth and efficient. One standout feature is the custom keyword plan option, which gave us the flexibility we needed to target specific goals. The team at Wincher has been nothing short of amazing—responsive, helpful, and truly invested in their customers’ success. Wincher has become a cornerstone in our SEO strategy, and I highly recommend it to any business or organization looking to take their online visibility to the next level. Thanks to Wincher, we’re not only tracking our rankings but gaining actionable insights to grow.
cons: Nothing, everything perfect until now on my experience
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very satisfied and would likely recommend Wincher to everyone that owns/operates a blog.
author: Chang Hwan K.
pros: Very simple to setup, easy to use. Add the plugin to the wordpress and at the bottom of each page is the plugin which can be used to add that specific page to track SERP on Wincher.
cons: Their current lowest price plan is $49, but it would be nice to have something cheaper so new blogs that don't make revenue can also benefit from their service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Brett P.
pros: I've been doing SEO for years, but Wincher was the first tool I used to actually track my keywords and rankings. It has been incredibly useful to watch the real-time improvements on each page. I could name a list of features that stand out, but the morning emails with notable changes are something I look forward to every day.
cons: It's a bit pricey but well worth the cost
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, Wincher is an invaluable tool for anyone serious about improving their SEO. Its robust features, ease of use, and excellent customer support make it a standout choice in the crowded SEO tool market. Highly recommend it!
author: Kattia B.
pros: User-Friendly Interface: The dashboard is intuitive and easy to navigate, making it accessible for users of all skill levels.
cons: Feature Limitations in Lower Tiers: Some advanced features may only be available in higher-tier plans, which could limit functionality for users on a budget.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Wincher offers great value for money
description: User friendly and great tool to improve your website keywords!
author: Nikki V.
pros: Wincher offers great value for money Weekly ranking summary and monthly ranking reports Adding a competitor’s website, allowing you to compare your website with competitors. Keyword explorer, On page seo checker, AI content outliner
cons: I can honestly say there is nothing I don't like about Wincher
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Could be the greates rank-tracking tool on the market
description: Very pleased since day one. I use it for my own sites, client istes, prospecting, market research, keyword ideas, on page analysis. This tóol covers the needs very well
author: Magnus S.
pros: Easy to use Accurate rank-tracking (critical) Keyword suggestions Easy to set up
cons: To be honest i find it hard to find anything that I dislike about it but maybe the report template could be with a more neat layout. But not an issues actually.

description: I love Wincher. I've tried the other SEO platforms and this is by far the easiest to understand and the most affordable. The 'On page SEO checker' is a brilliant feature that really helps you optimise your page, it deserves more prominence really. It has all the features you need such as keyword research, competitor analysis, reports etc. Good support when needed. Recommended!
author: Sara W.
pros: Easy to understand and affordable. The competitors are complex and take a huge amount of learning, so if you're new to SEO or you just need the basics, this is a brilliant, reliable tool that gets results. Used in combination with Google tools, it's really all you need!
cons: Has some small UX issues which can easily be ironed out.

review_title: Nice and affordable tool for tracking your rankings
description: The overall experienci is great, that's why we are using the tool for years and have seen their improvements now and then... nowadays i think is a perfectly usable tool for tracking positions and seo.
author: daniel J.
pros: The easy to understand and manage interface let you choice and track the keywords important for each web and compare to competitors in a very visual way
cons: sometimes the numbers or figures are a bit complicated to understand (in ex. the lower the better, the higher the better)

review_title: Wincher - The affordable and easy to use rank tracking tool
description: Its fantastic, it works really well, its easy to use and very affordable even for an agency.
author: mathias B.
pros: I really like the ease of use and value for money with Wincher.
cons: Wincher could improve the accuracy of the displayed page in relation to a keyword. Wincher could also improve the connection to data studio for reporting.

author: Mantas U.
pros: easy of use, all necesary tools for monitoring your site performance
cons: lacks some tools that competitors have like backlinks tracker

author: Paul J.
pros: Dashboard allows me to swap between websites I am tracking. Adding competitors allows me to see my position against competitors. Setting for white label reports allows me to send reports to business partners and client.
cons: Would like to add more competitors on my plan. Price is a little more than I would expect but I am grateful for the response and the service of Wincher staff

review_title: Wincher, my daily go to for web performance analysis
description: It is a one-stop place for a quick look and therefore easy to look at it every day. And I like that they send email information daily about how we are doing which reminds me to take a look.
author: Kathy S.
pros: I like the quick view of where the keywords are ranked, what's gone up or down, how many clicks we receive, and the overall volume of searches for the keywords. And the fact that I can sort the columns to see exactly what I need to look at for the day.
cons: SEO is so huge and complicated, I wish I had more help in what would be helpful to improve hits to the pages.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The only SEO tool you need
description: Go get wincher ! It's economically priced and just what you need. Everything other tool out there is way more expensive and the features they sell you are most likely a gimmick.
author: Vivek K.
pros: I have been using wincher for more than a year now, it works like a charm. It's my daily prompt and helps me plan better. I use it on two sites that I own.
cons: It tells me the current rank of keywords I want to track and compares it to a bunch of my competitors. It would be so cool if it could also tell me the keywords that me & my competitors are ranking on.

review_title: Best value for money SEO tracking and keyword tool
description: Want to keep track of all the important SEO data without paying top dollar every month? Stop searching and start with Wincher.
author: Martijn B.
pros: Very easy to set up. Lost of SEO metrics, but presented in very clear tables.
cons: Alarming e-mails when your rankings drop. But you can disable those notifications and focus on the positive ;-)

description: I like too much this software for our company.
author: Mayura M.
pros: Best Ranking Software and save our lots of time to create ranking report.
cons: Price is little more for small organisation

review_title: Easy to use and very professional
author: Johan S.
pros: The easy of use and the fact that it gives med facts when talking to my clients. It makes me look better than I am. :-)
cons: The price maybe. For me as a small consultant company it is a lot of money, but I think it is worth it.

review_title: Wincher is a great monitoring tool for SEO
description: It's such a powerful piece of SEO software to help support my marketing strategy.
author: Elena P.
pros: Wincher gives you support with your SEO strategy, it's super user friendly. I would highly recommend Wincher, as it will give you exactly what you need for your SEO analysis against your competitors. Wincher also has the opportunity to use other marketing analysis tools into your account to allow for further analysis.
cons: For me, it's great all round, if you have any problems there is an online chat support.

description: Great tool, great possibilities but needs to focus on website traffic, converisions and sales.Keyword search and suggestions are rather limited for my car accessories store.
author: guenther B.
pros: Easy to use, updates send to email, clear information.
cons: Does not increase website traffic significantly!!!!! In my case!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
